work_performed: TBM advance - Rings 344-352 installed (8 rings). Total advance 4.2 feet/ring = 33.6 feet. Average EPB face pressure maintained 18-22 PSI. Muck volume 820 CY removed via belt conveyor. Segment erection Rings 344-352 completed - 5-piece universal ring. Annular grout injection rings 338-343 complete. Dewatering system: all 18 wells operating normal - groundwater at -62 feet BGS. Surface settlement monitoring: all 28 instruments within green threshold. 148 underground workers + 42 surface.
safety_incidents: Minor near-miss - muck skip derailed at Ring 290 - no injury - skip re-railed and inspected
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

work_performed: TBM advance Rings 353-360 installed (7 rings - 1 ring lost to cutterhead inspection). EPB face inspection at Ring 357 - 3 worn disc cutters replaced per Herrenknecht PM schedule. Thrust cylinders checked - all 18 within spec. Total TBM advance to date: 4,284 feet (Ring 1020 of 3,100 target rings). Annular grout 344-350 injected. Surface: segment delivery 3 trucks x 22 rings each received and staged. HNTB resident engineer walk-through - all items satisfactory. 152 underground workers + 38 surface.
delays: Cutterhead inspection required - 1 ring lost - 6 hour delay recorded
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

work_performed: Surface blizzard conditions - surface operations limited. Underground TBM advance continued - Rings 361-367 (6 rings). Face pressure elevated slightly to 20-24 PSI due to groundwater response to surface barometric pressure change. Settlement monitoring 10820 S Michigan Ave - Alert Level 1 confirmed at 0.52 inches - compensation grouting initiated per RFI-005 interim response plan. Grouting volumes: 180 gallons sodium silicate injected at 4 ports. Monitoring frequency increased to hourly. 144 underground workers + 18 surface (limited).
delays: Surface segment delivery suspended - snow - 4 hour surface delay - TBM underground advance not impacted
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

work_performed: Post-storm recovery. Surface work resumed. TBM Rings 368-375 (7 rings). Settlement at 10820 Michigan Ave stabilized at 0.54 inches - within Alert Level 1 but no longer advancing. HNTB approved continuation per RFI-005. Compensation grouting standby maintained. Dewatering all 18 wells operational. Launching shaft crane maintenance - 80-ton Liebherr 500-hr service completed. Ground improvement at CP-02 cross passage: jet grouting 8 of 16 columns complete. 156 underground workers + 44 surface.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

FTA DBE compliance officer call scheduled for January 22. IEPA groundwater report Q4 2025 submitted to regulator. 162 underground workers + 46 surface.
